title: Cobblemon Miscadventures
body:
Cobblemon Miscadventures is a NeoForge modpack centered around Cobblemon and Create, while also enhancing the the game without steering too far away from the Vanilla feel.

The modpack features:
- Cobblemon, pokemon with Minecraft friendly designs
- Create, one of the most impressive and Vanilla friendly tech mods
- CC: Tweaked, letting you use computers to enhance your contraptions
- Moog's structure redesigns to spice up exploration
- Basic storage improvements with Tom's Simple Storage
- Many performance and visual enhancement mods

Now, despite how contradictory it sounds, the goal of this modpack is to provide a Vanilla+ Cobblemon and Create experience. Yes, Cobblemon and Create are not exactly Vanilla+, but I ultimately wanted to be able to play Minecraft with pokemon, without them being the entire focus like Cobblemon's predecessors. I feel this modpack accomplishes that.
